reasoning: The control 3.1.6 focuses on using non-privileged accounts or roles for accessing non-security functions. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that no service accounts or users are bound to the cluster-admin role unless absolutely necessary, enforcing least privilege by assigning the minimal set of permissions required for a task, and ensuring that service accounts are restricted to roles that do not have administrative privileges.
title: 3_1_6: 3.1.6 Use non-privileged accounts or roles when accessing nonsecurity functions
